case_title: TECTUM INC. VS UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO.

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21811, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TECTUM INC. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TECTUM INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,029.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TECTUM INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED EXPOSITION SERVICE CO. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,029.00, JUDG.ENTERED ON 7/30/92 IN SUP.CT.SCA 21811. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
